---
title: "A-Level Mathematics Tutoring"
---

A-Level Pure Mathematics (P3/P4) 과외 수업 자료입니다.
개념 설명은 영어, 주석 및 풀이 가이드는 한국어로 제공합니다.

## Topics

| Unit | Topic |
|------|-------|
| 2 | [Transformation](2_transformation/basic_forms.qmd) |
| 3 | [Numerical Methods](3_numerical_method/core_concept.qmd) |
| 4 | [Further Trigonometry](4_further_tria/further_trigonometry.qmd) |
| 5 | [Differentiation Pt.1](5_differentiation_part1/core_concepts.md) |
| 6 | [Review Exercise](6_review_exercise/review_exercise.qmd) |
| 7 | [Differentiation Pt.2](7_differentiation_part2/core_concepts_v2.md) |
| 8 | [Integration](8_integration/core_concepts.md) |
| 9 | [Differential Equations](9_differential_equation/core_concepts.md) |
